translation: There is no oil at home.

sentence: Ina so, amma ba ni da kudi.
translation: I want to, but I have no money.

sentence: Idan ka zo, za mu ci abinci.
translation: If you come, we will eat.
The house is behind the market.

sentence: Ban zo ba saboda ruwan sama.
translation: I did not come because of the rain.
I have a lot of work.
The women are working on the farm.
I have been here since morning.
I am going to the market.
I did it for your sake.
